---
title: "App.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/App.tsx"
loc: 148
complexity: 11
logic_score: 1.95
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 2.27
overall_score: 1.89
---

## Intent
React component rendering App.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <App /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 58 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useState](file://react)
- [useEffect](file://react)
- [Component](file://react)
- [ReactNode](file://react)
- [Canvas](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [OrbitControls](file://@react-three/drei)
- [PerspectiveCamera](file://@react-three/drei)
- [NeuralGraph](file://./components/NeuralGraph.tsx)
- [PlaybackHUD](file://./components/PlaybackHUD.tsx)
- [*](file://three)

### Exports
- `logToServer`
- `params`
- `token`
- `MatrixErrorBoundary`
- `App`
- `App`
- `token`
- `matrixData`
- `gravityData`
- `nodeMap`
- `isLive`
- `currentIndex`
- `sessionHistory`
- `params`
- `t`
- `handleError`
- `fetchData`
- `matrixRes`
- `mData`
- `gData`
